title: Company Names Tribunal decision: HWCD London Ltd
body: "Application number 5104  Applicant HWCD Holding Ltd objected to the name used by HWCD London Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 1 May 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of HWCD London Ltd is changed to 15520598, Ltd. "
